error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: Notion node resource not found error
symptom: When using the Notion node for 'Get' or 'Update' operations, n8n throws 'The resource you are requesting could not be found'. This occurs even when the correct ID is used.
not_this_if: Correct IDs are used for database pages
root_cause: The error occurs because users are mixing up Database IDs and Database Page IDs. The Database ID is for the entire database, while the Database Page ID is for individual entries within that database. Using the wrong ID type leads to the resource not being found.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the correct Database Page ID for 'Get' or 'Update' operations.
Double-check that the relevant pages and databases are shared with your integration.
agent_instruction: Verify and use the correct Database Page ID for your Notion node operations.
